sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὡραῖος

- Transliteration: Horaios

- Phonetic: ho-rah'-yos

- Definition:

1. blooming, beautiful (used of the human body)

- Origin: from G5610

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G5610; belonging to the right hour or season (timely) that is (by implication) flourishing (beauteous [figuratively]): - beautiful.
